candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label on the income statement; preferred candidate and appropriate single reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line on the income statement; best match for cost of goods sold among candidates.
Inventory asset row on the balance sheet, not an expense, so not suitable for COGS.

variables.notes: Used the income statement expense row; excluded the balance sheet inventory row.

candidates.why: Capitalized amount is not an operating expense line and should not be used as SG&A.
Operating overhead component above operating income; good SG&A bucket.
Operating overhead/personnel cost component above operating income; good SG&A bucket.
Potential overhead bucket, but appears less necessary when more specific populated overhead components exist.
Dedicated R&D row exists but appears in supplemental section below EBIT; not included in SG&A per placement rule.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet gross asset row, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability accrual, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best operating overhead components and excluded D&A, COGS, finance items, and balance sheet rows.

candidates.why: Capitalized development costs are not R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D label; best match for research and development expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D is not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset row, not income statement R&D expense.
Amortization line on the balance sheet detail, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below EBIT/supplemental, so it was not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Total finance expense line includes non-interest items such as FX and valuation effects; less preferred than granular recurring interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses attributable to other borrowings
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on borrowings; strong match for XINT.
Recurring lease interest; should be included in XINT when present.
Could include recurring finance costs, but too broad and not needed when explicit interest rows exist.
Not a finance cost.
Not a finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease interest line that may represent the same concept across periods/labels; suitable recurring interest component.
Generic interest expense label; suitable fallback label if populated in some period.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Equity, not finance cost.
Equity, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses attributable to other borrowings
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest rows and excluded total Financial expenses because underlying components exist and the total also contains non-interest items like exchange losses/value changes.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet book equity.
Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet book equity.
Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Direct parent/shareholder equity line on the balance sheet; preferred BE because it excludes non-controlling interests.
This is minority interest, not BE.
Acceptable only if parent equity line were unavailable; here parent equity line exists, so total equity is less preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent equity to avoid double counting with minority interest.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement profit attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Alternative balance sheet minority-interest label for some periods.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority options across periods.
